title: SR 12-11 / CA 12-10: Supervisory Letter SR 12-11 / CA 12-10 on         Guidance on a Lender’s Decision to Discontinue Foreclosure Proceedings  -- July 11, 2012
title_normalized: Supervisory Letter SR 12-11 / CA 12-10 on         Guidance on a Lender’s Decision to Discontinue Foreclosure Proceedings  -- July 11, 2012
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 12-11 / CA 12-10
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: to Community Banking Organizations:  This guidance applies to state member banks, bank holding companies, and savings and loan holding companies with residential mortgage servicing operations, including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets.
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK
